context: Tests whether the agent follows the TDD planning phase: listing behaviors (not implementation steps), identifying deep module opportunities, designing for testability, planning a tracer bullet first, and flagging items for user confirmation.

checklist.name: Behaviors not steps
checklist.description: The behavior list describes user-observable outcomes (e.g. 'registered member can log in') not implementation steps (e.g. 'hash password with bcrypt')

checklist.name: Tracer bullet identified
checklist.description: The plan identifies a single simplest end-to-end test as the first RED→GREEN cycle (the tracer bullet)

checklist.name: Incremental order planned
checklist.description: The plan shows a sequence of individual behaviors/tests, not a bulk list of all tests followed by all implementations

checklist.name: Deep module opportunity identified
checklist.description: Plan explicitly identifies at least one opportunity for a deep module — where complex logic (e.g. password hashing, token generation) is hidden behind a small public interface

checklist.name: Testability design decision
checklist.description: Plan explicitly addresses at least one interface design decision made to improve testability (e.g. dependency injection of token generator or hash function)

checklist.name: Public interface designed
checklist.description: Plan proposes a public interface with method signatures — covering at minimum register, login, and session validation

checklist.name: Questions for user
checklist.description: Plan includes at least one question to confirm with the team before starting (e.g. which behaviors to prioritize, what the session interface should look like)

checklist.name: Domain language used
checklist.description: Plan uses 'Member' for users and 'Session' for authenticated context (as specified in the domain language), not generic terms like 'user' or 'token'

checklist.name: Interface accepts dependencies
checklist.description: Proposed interface shows external dependencies (e.g. mailer, token store) accepted as parameters rather than created internally

checklist.name: Behaviors prioritized
checklist.description: Plan notes which behaviors are most critical and should be tested first, not treating all behaviors as equal
